title: Solana DeFi Grant
description: For lending and borrowing protocols building on Solana. Requires working MVP and clear path to mainnet.
eligibility: Open to teams with at least one technical founder. Project must be open source.

title: Polygon Gaming Accelerator
description: 12-week accelerator for Web3 gaming projects. Includes mentorship, funding, and demo day.
eligibility: Games with playable prototype. Team must commit to building on Polygon.

title: Ethereum Foundation Academic Grant
description: Support for research and infrastructure projects that advance Ethereum. Ideal for academic teams.
eligibility: Academic institutions or research teams. Open source required.

title: BNB Chain Builder Grant
description: Funding for dApps, tools, and infrastructure on BNB Chain. Rolling applications.
eligibility: Any project building on BNB Chain. Must pass basic KYC.

title: Avalanche Rush Fund
description: Liquidity and development grants for DeFi protocols launching on Avalanche C-Chain.
eligibility: Established DeFi teams with existing TVL. Matching funds required.

title: Chainlink BUILD
description: For projects integrating Chainlink oracles. Includes technical support and go-to-market help.
eligibility: Projects actively using or planning to use Chainlink services.
